qa_pairs.question: What is the main reason for the annual renewal of Alliance user accounts?
qa_pairs.answer: The annual renewal is necessary to gather up-to-date information for granting agencies and to deactivate accounts that are no longer in use.

qa_pairs.question: Who is required to renew their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: All Alliance users must renew their account between May 6 and June 9, 2026, with an exception for those who created their account after January 1.

qa_pairs.question: If I just created my Alliance account after January 1, do I still need to renew it?
qa_pairs.answer: No, you do not have to renew your account at this time, but you must accept new policies and consents when you first log into CCDB.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I review the Privacy Policy and other agreements I've accepted?
qa_pairs.answer: You can view all accepted agreements on the 'Agreements' page on CCDB, and policies are also available on the Alliance website.

qa_pairs.question: What is a primary role and why is it important?
qa_pairs.answer: Your primary role is your main position, typically the one you'll hold for the longest, and it's crucial for account management, communication, and reporting. Failing to renew it will lead to account deactivation.

qa_pairs.question: Can I change my primary role in Alliance?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, users with multiple active roles can change their primary role at any time on CCDB's 'Home' page by selecting 'Make this role primary'.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if my situation, such as my faculty position or academic level, has changed?
qa_pairs.answer: You must apply for a new role through CCDB under 'My Account' -> 'Apply for a new role', requesting one role at a time and disabling old roles if they are no longer needed.

qa_pairs.question: My Alliance account has been deactivated, but I still need to access my data to move it off the clusters. What should I do?
qa_pairs.answer: You should send an email to support@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance with accessing your data.

qa_pairs.question: If I am a faculty member and do not renew my account, what are the consequences?
qa_pairs.answer: Your account, along with the accounts of all users you sponsor, will be deactivated, pausing any submitted jobs and revoking access to files until your sponsor account is reactivated.

qa_pairs.question: As a Principal Investigator (PI), what steps do I take to renew my account?
qa_pairs.answer: You'll receive an email with a link to the CCDB renewal form; update your contact, Field of Research, complete a User Satisfaction Survey, update sponsored roles status, and click 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL'.

qa_pairs.question: If I am a PI moving to a new institution, will my sponsored users automatically transfer to my new role?
qa_pairs.answer: No, sponsored users must apply for new roles under your new faculty position, and you may need to add them to your Resource Allocation Project (RAP) afterwards.

qa_pairs.question: Can I access the files of a sponsored user who has moved on and is no longer under my sponsorship?
qa_pairs.answer: Accessing files from a former sponsored user may require their consent, so it's important to make arrangements with them as soon as possible.

qa_pairs.question: What do I need to do to renew my sponsored role (e.g., Doctoral, Masters, External Collaborator)?
qa_pairs.answer: You will receive an email directing you to the CCDB renewal form; update your contact information, complete the form, fill out a User Satisfaction Survey, and click 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL'.

qa_pairs.question: My sponsored role is still deactivated even after I completed the renewal on CCDB. Why is this happening?
qa_pairs.answer: Your role remains deactivated because your sponsor has not yet renewed or reactivated their own account and confirmed your role; it will activate once they do.

qa_pairs.question: I renewed my account with the wrong role. How can I fix this mistake?
qa_pairs.answer: You should log into CCDB, go to 'My Account' -> 'Apply for a new role' to create a new role with your correct information, which your sponsor will then need to confirm.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I am trying to reactivate an old sponsored role but my sponsor cannot confirm it?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance with your request.
